title: Bitcoin’s quantum problem gets a recovery tool, but not for Satoshi’s 1.1 million coins
summary: Project Eleven says it has funded a proof that lets a wallet's own key-derivation path stand in as ownership after quantum computers can forge its signatures. It runs in 243 milliseconds on a laptop.

title: Inside Zcash's new node that targets Visa-scale privacy at 50,000 transactions per second
summary: The new Zakura client is the first live piece of a plan to take Zcash from roughly one private transaction per second to payment-network scale.

title: France orders country's internet service providers to block Polymarket
summary: The regulator cited concerns over addictive mechanics, a lack of self-exclusion tools, and a high volume of French users bypassing previous financial restrictions.

title: Crypto executives say digital native generations may never need a bank account
summary: Steakhouse Financial co-founder Adrian Cachinero says digital-native generations may rely less on banks, while Binance says younger users are already driving crypto adoption in emerging markets.

title: DOG Mode explains Bitcoin's next governance fight
summary: Leonidas' DOG Mode client challenges Bitcoin's default relay policies, reopening a philosophical debate over censorship, free markets and who really governs the network.
